StepAction: Session-level driver evaluates compaction need (context-budget heuristic)
Gate: Feature::RemoteCompactionV2 enabled AND should_use_remote_compact_task(provider) true (e.g. Azure check)

Empty-input short-circuit: if prompt.input.is_empty() return Ok([]); otherwise call build_responses_request, then destructure ResponsesApiRequest into CompactionInput (drops tool_choice/store/stream/include/client_metadata)

Assemble extra_headers: insert x-codex-installation-id (HTTP header form!); extend build_responses_headers (beta only, turn_state=None); extend build_responses_identity_headers (window/parent/subagent); extend build_session_headers (session_id/thread_id pairs); optional attestation
ApiCompactClient::compact_input(CompactionInput, extra_headers) → serde_json::to_value → POST responses/compact → wait for unary response (no SSE)
serde_json::from_slice → CompactHistoryResponse { output: Vec<ResponseItem> }; return output to caller to replace conversation history
Gate failed — fall through to local (non-remote) compaction or skip compaction this round
Early return Ok(Vec::new()) — nothing to compact
Transport / parse error — emit ApiError; caller decides fallback (retry, skip compaction, fail turn)
